opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: This rash started with one big spot a week ago, and now my entire torso is covered in these scaly red marks. I'm terrified it's spreading to my organs.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A widespread scaly rash came up fast over my trunk and I'm frightened it's something serious.

symptom_narrative.onset: one large patch a week ago, then a widespread eruption over the last 48h
symptom_narrative.character: oval salmon-coloured scaly patches with a fine inner scale, mild itch
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: chest, back and tummy (spares my face, palms and soles)
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: mild viral prodrome (tiredness, sore throat) ~2 weeks ago; NO fever, joint pain, mouth/genital sores, no palm/sole lesions, no new medicines

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: scrubbing the rash, made it drier

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; very anxious about the rash

objective_data_offered.value: one larger patch on the flank then many oval scaly salmon patches over the trunk following skin lines, sparing face/palms/soles, visible on video
no fever, no mouth/genital sores, no palm/sole rash
